violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were made available at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

The floor in the built-in walk-in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris below the milk storage rack. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
The hand-washing sink in the employee bathroom was lacking paper towels. Paper towels supplied at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

The floor in the built-in walk-in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
